basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has published the Young Professionals-II (YP II) Notification 2026 on 2026 at the official ANGRAU website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Young Professionals-II (YP II) positions. Candidates within the age range of up to 40 years and holding M.Sc. (Ag.) in Genetics & Plant Breeding, M.Sc. (Ag.) in Agronomy/Soil Science, or M.Sc. (Ag.) in Plant Pathology are eligible to apply. The application process will be conducted through walk-in on 02 July 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification details below.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ANGRAU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Young Professionals-II (YP II) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Young Professionals-II (YP II) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ANGRAU Young Professionals-II (YP II) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts at Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University is scheduled for 02 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Young Professionals-II (YP II) at ANGRAU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) positions announced by ANGRAU.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. (Ag.) degree in Genetics & Plant Breeding, Agronomy/Soil Science, or Plant Pathology, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the ANGRAU Young Professionals-II (YP II) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear in person at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ANGRAU office in Peddapuram, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 533437.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professionals-II (YP II) posts at Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University is scheduled for 02 July 2026.
